summary: Backend testing for P2 Premium Feature Gating completed successfully. All 15 tests passed. Verified that trial users are blocked from premium features (CSV exports) with proper 402 status codes and informative headers (X-Required-Feature, X-Current-Plan).
critical_code_review_comments: Feature class correctly defines core (trial+paid) and premium (paid-only) features in dependencies.py
PLAN_FEATURES dict properly maps trial/monthly/annual plans to their available features
require_premium_feature() dependency correctly returns 402 with X-Required-Feature and X-Current-Plan headers
GET /api/subscription/features correctly returns feature flags based on plan type
All export endpoints (/api/export/minutes, distributions, compensation, tasks) use require_premium_feature(Feature.CSV_EXPORT)
Trial users: Core features (minutes_basic, distributions_basic, governance_basic, single_trust) = True
Trial users: Premium features (csv_export, benevolence_mode, trust_units, etc.) = False
Error message is informative: 'This feature requires a paid subscription. Please upgrade from trial to access. Feature: csv_export'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user on trial plan
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium feature gating fully tested. Trial users correctly receive 402 for CSV export endpoints with X-Required-Feature and X-Current-Plan headers. Feature flags: Trial gets 4 core features (minutes_basic, distributions_basic, governance_basic, single_trust). Premium features require monthly/annual plan. Key files: dependencies.py (Feature class, PLAN_FEATURES dict, require_premium_feature), server.py lines 4404-4421 (/api/subscription/features), 4144-4293 (export endpoints with feature gating).
